Package com.here.platform.data.client.model

Interface PendingPartition

All Known Implementing Classes:
DeletedPartition, NewPartition
public interface PendingPartition

A partition pending for commit, either a new partition, an update to an existing partition, or the deletion of an existing partition.

A new or updated partition is represented by the concrete subclass for - Scala: NewPartition or - Java: com.here.platform.data.client.javadsl.NewPartition.

A partition to be deleted is represented by the concrete subclass for - Scala: DeletedPartition or - Java: com.here.platform.data.client.javadsl.DeletedPartition.

This trait is not designed for custom implementations. The API will reject subtypes not created by the API itself.
